problems.title: Design Ad Auction Engine (second-price / VCG, reserve pricing)
problems.summary: In-process auction library implementing GSP and VCG with reserves, squashing, and deterministic audit logs at 1.2M auctions/sec.

problems.title: Design Ad Click Tracking (clickstream → idempotent counter)
problems.summary: HMAC-signed click redirects, Kafka+Flink dedup and bot filtering, exactly-once budget decrement, and billing-grade aggregates at 25k clicks/s.

problems.title: Design Budget Pacing & Frequency Capping (avoid overspend, cap frequency)
problems.summary: PID-controlled token-bucket pacer with Redis-backed budget and frequency cap state, sub-millisecond admission at 5M QPS, async spend reconciliation.

problems.title: Design Google Ads (auction + serving + reporting)
problems.summary: Search/display ad platform with sub-100ms auctions, Quality Score-based GSP pricing, and near-real-time advertiser reporting at 1.2M QPS.

problems.title: Design Multi-touch Attribution System (last-touch → MTA models)
problems.summary: Cross-device journey stitching with last-touch, time-decay, Markov, and Shapley MTA models over 200B daily touchpoints.

problems.title: Design Real-time Bidding (RTB exchange — sub-100ms auction)
problems.summary: OpenRTB ad exchange that fans out to dozens of DSPs, runs second-price auctions, and handles 5M QPS within a hard 100ms budget.

problems.title: Design Datadog-style Metrics Pipeline (ingest → tsdb → dashboards)
problems.summary: Trillions of metric points/day: agent ingest, Kafka fan-out, Gorilla TSDB shards, rollups, alerting, and tag-based query at sub-second latency.

problems.title: Design Distributed Tracing (OpenTelemetry / Jaeger — span propagation)
problems.summary: OTel ingest, trace-id partitioned Kafka, Flink sessionization for trace assembly, tail-based sampling, blob+index storage, and service-graph derivation.

problems.title: Design Funnel & Retention Analytics (sessionization at scale)
problems.summary: Lambda architecture for funnel + retention: Flink stream sessionizer, Spark batch re-derivation over Parquet, ClickHouse hot cube, RoaringBitmap retention.

problems.title: Design Log Aggregation Pipeline (Splunk-style, Elasticsearch + Kafka)
problems.summary: 200 TB/day log ingest with Kafka as durable buffer, Flink parser/enricher, Elasticsearch hot tier with ILM, and Parquet/S3 cold archive with restore.

problems.title: Design Mixpanel / Amplitude Event Analytics (funnel + cohort)
problems.summary: Product analytics over 50B events/day: schema-on-read events, ClickHouse hot tier, S3/Parquet cold lake, funnel and cohort queries with bitmap retention.

problems.title: Design Real-time Event Collector (HTTP → Kafka → S3, billions of events/day)
problems.summary: Public HTTPS collector at 600K rps peak: edge auth, idempotent Kafka producer, schema validation, exactly-once Parquet landing on S3, and DLQ.

problems.title: Design Audible (audiobook platform with offline)
problems.summary: Long-form audiobooks with entitlement, DRM downloads, and Whispersync cross-device resume.

problems.title: Design Clubhouse / Twitter Spaces (live audio rooms with WebRTC)
problems.summary: Live audio rooms at scale: SFU media routing, cascading, presence, recording, and moderation.

problems.title: Design Pandora (radio-style personalized streaming)
problems.summary: Lean-back personalized radio stations driven by the Music Genome and real-time thumbs feedback.

problems.title: Design Pocket FM (audio series platform)
problems.summary: Serialized audio shows with coin-based unlocks, ad insertion, and aggressive personalization.

problems.title: Design SoundCloud (UGC audio + waveform)
problems.summary: User-generated audio uploads with transcoding, waveform comments, social feed, and copyright fingerprinting.

problems.title: Design Spotify (audio streaming at scale)
problems.summary: On-demand music streaming: catalog, playback, DRM, recommendations, royalty-grade play accounting.

problems.title: Design Anycast Routing for global CDN (BGP, geo-DNS, latency-based)
problems.summary: BGP anycast + GeoDNS + RUM-driven latency map to steer 50M req/s to optimal POPs with sub-second failover.

problems.title: Design CDN architecture (Cloudflare/Akamai-style, hierarchical caching)
problems.summary: Global CDN with anycast edge POPs, regional shield tier, NVMe slab cache, and 50M req/sec at the edge.

problems.title: Design Dynamic Content Acceleration (DSA, edge compute, route optimization)
problems.summary: Edge TLS termination, V8 isolate workers, persistent H2 origin pools, private overlay routing, and micro-caching for uncacheable APIs.

problems.title: Design Edge Cache Invalidation (purge at billions of files)
problems.summary: Tag/URL/prefix purge across 300 POPs in <5s using Raft-ordered log, generation counters, and POP-local multicast fanout.

problems.title: Design Image CDN with on-the-fly resize / format conversion
problems.summary: URL-driven image transforms (AVIF/WebP/JPEG), tiered derivative cache, single-flight coalescing for viral images.

problems.title: Design Multi-region Failover (active-active vs active-passive)
problems.summary: Per-workload RPO/RTO design: Postgres single-leader async vs Spanner/CRDT multi-leader, with fencing tokens and cross-region probing.

problems.title: Design Document Version History (snapshots + ops-log + branching)
problems.summary: Time-travel and branching for collaborative docs: ordered op log + S3 snapshots every 1k ops, named versions, CRDT/OT merge, lifecycle to Glacier.

problems.title: Design Figma (CRDT, multiplayer cursors, vector graphics sync)
problems.summary: Multiplayer vector design tool using a tree CRDT (Yjs-style), fractional indexing, move-tree conflict resolution, and out-of-band cursors.

problems.title: Design Google Docs (Operational Transformation, OT)
problems.summary: Real-time rich-text co-editing with OT: server-serialized op log, transform functions, snapshots, presence, and offline merge.

problems.title: Design Notion (block-based docs, multi-tenant, sync engine)
problems.summary: Block-tree workspace with Postgres-per-tenant sharding, optimistic block ops, scoped Yjs for text, Kafka-fed search and audit.

problems.title: Design Presence + Live Cursor Service (ephemeral state, broadcast)
problems.summary: Horizontal presence service: 50M websocket connections, two-tier fanout, consistent-hash room shards, 5s disconnect detection, no durability.

problems.title: Design Real-time Whiteboard (Miro/Excalidraw — strokes, selection sync)
problems.summary: Infinite canvas with Y.Map CRDT for shapes, 60 Hz stroke streaming out-of-band, ScyllaDB op log, and viewport-aware loading.

problems.title: Design Consensus (Raft and Paxos walkthrough)
problems.summary: Raft leader election, log replication, safety invariants, snapshots, membership change; contrast with Paxos, Multi-Paxos, EPaxos, ZAB.

problems.title: Design Distributed Transactions (2PC, Saga, XA, Spanner-style TrueTime)
problems.summary: Atomic commit across shards/services: 2PC blocking problem, XA pitfalls, Saga with compensations, Percolator SI, Spanner TrueTime commit-wait.

problems.title: Design Replication: leader-based vs leaderless vs multi-leader
problems.summary: Single-leader sync/async, multi-leader with conflict resolution, Dynamo-style leaderless with quorums, lag anomalies and consistency knobs.

problems.title: Design a B-tree Storage Engine (page-based, WAL, buffer pool)
problems.summary: Disk-resident B+-tree behind Postgres/InnoDB: pages, splits, buffer pool, ARIES recovery, latches vs locks, MVCC, vacuum.

problems.title: Design a Write-ahead Log (durability, replay, group commit)
problems.summary: Append-only durability primitive: record format, fsync semantics, group commit, segment rotation, CRC, recovery, CDC consumers.

problems.title: Design an LSM-tree Storage Engine (memtable -> SSTable -> compaction)
problems.summary: Single-node KV engine: WAL + skiplist memtable, immutable sorted SSTables, leveled vs size-tiered compaction, bloom filters, MVCC via sequence numbers.

problems.title: Design Amazon (product catalog + checkout + recs at scale)
problems.summary: Planet-scale e-commerce: 600M SKUs, faceted search, personalized recs, ACID checkout, payments saga across 300M customers.

problems.title: Design Flipkart (Big Billion Day flash-sale handling)
problems.summary: BBD-grade flash-sale platform: virtual waiting room, serializable inventory decrement, idempotent payments, bot defense.

problems.title: Design Inventory Management at Scale (oversell prevention, multi-warehouse)
problems.summary: 100M SKUs across 500 warehouses: serializable stock decrement, soft holds, bucketed counters for hot SKUs, WMS reconciliation.

problems.title: Design Order Pipeline / Order Lifecycle (state machine, saga, returns)
problems.summary: End-to-end order lifecycle: outbox-driven saga, orchestrated state machine, idempotent compensations, returns and refunds sub-saga.

problems.title: Design Shopify (multi-tenant SaaS for 1M+ merchants)
problems.summary: Cellular multi-tenant platform: 2M merchants, per-pod MySQL, BFCM survival, webhook fan-out, noisy-neighbor isolation.

problems.title: Design Shopping Cart (multi-device, persistence, abandoned-cart)
problems.summary: 200M-user cart: DynamoDB durable + Redis cache, optimistic concurrency, WS multi-device sync, streaming abandonment pipeline.

problems.title: Design Dropbox / Google Drive (file sync + delta encoding)
problems.summary: Cloud file sync with content-addressed blocks, delta encoding via Rabin chunking, and WebSocket-based change notifications.

problems.title: Design File Deduplication System (content-defined chunking, hash dedup)
problems.summary: Exabyte-scale dedup tier using FastCDC content-defined chunking, BLAKE3 hashing, sharded LSM index, and epoch-based GC.

problems.title: Design Large File Upload (chunked, resumable, multipart, virus scan)
problems.summary: Resumable multi-terabyte uploads via presigned direct-to-storage parts, idempotent retries, and async virus scanning.

problems.title: Design Real-time File Sync (multi-device, conflict resolution)
problems.summary: Per-file op log over Kafka with vector clocks, hybrid WebSocket + silent-push delivery, and pluggable conflict resolution (LWW / 3-way / CRDT).

problems.title: Design S3-style Object Storage (durability 11-9s, erasure coding)
problems.summary: Exabyte-scale object store with Reed-Solomon 10+4 erasure coding, sharded linearizable index, and 11 nines of durability.

problems.title: Design iCloud Photos (cross-device sync, ML tagging, encryption)
problems.summary: End-to-end encrypted photo library with on-device ML tagging, encrypted search index, and CRDT-based tag sync.

problems.title: Design Delivery Dispatch & Routing (batching, courier assignment, ETA)
problems.summary: Region-sharded VRP solver on Kafka streams: min-cost flow assignment, batched offers, ETA service.

problems.title: Design DoorDash (3-sided marketplace at US scale)
problems.summary: 10M orders/day marketplace: VRP-based Deep Red dispatch, batched deliveries, multi-region Cockroach catalog.

problems.title: Design Real-time Order Tracking (driver location → customer in <2s)
problems.summary: Sub-2s ping fanout: WS gateways, Flink keyed join on courier_id, protobuf deltas, Redis Streams replay.

problems.title: Design Restaurant Search & Discovery (location + cuisine + ranking)
problems.summary: Sub-250ms hybrid retrieval: ES geo+BM25 plus ANN semantic recall, learned LightGBM ranker.

problems.title: Design Swiggy (food delivery in India: dispatch + routing)
problems.summary: End-to-end Indian food-delivery: discovery, orders, dispatch, live tracking under 2G/peak-spike conditions.

problems.title: Design Zomato (restaurant discovery + delivery)
problems.summary: Discovery-first food platform: search, ranking, reviews, ads, with delivery layered on top.

problems.title: Design Find My Friend / Find My Device (real-time location)
problems.summary: E2E-encrypted live location sharing with crowdsourced BLE offline finding, geofences, websocket fanout.

problems.title: Design Geo-search Nearby (top-K within radius, geohash + KD-tree)
problems.summary: Generic geo-nearby primitive: geohash, S2/H3, KD-tree, R-tree trade-offs; 50M moving entities, 1M rps.

problems.title: Design Google Maps (tile serving + routing + Places)
problems.summary: Planet-scale maps: vector tile pipeline, CH-based routing engine, Places search, live-traffic ingestion at 1B+ MAU.

problems.title: Design Real-time Traffic System (probe data to tile aggregation)
problems.summary: 33M probes/s ingest, HMM map-matching, 1-min edge aggregation, vector traffic tiles, incident detection in 60s.

problems.title: Design Routing Engine (Dijkstra to contraction hierarchies for road graphs)
problems.summary: Algorithmic ladder Dijkstra to bidirectional to A*/ALT to CH/CCH; 10B routes/day with sub-100ms p99 and live traffic.

problems.title: Design Yelp / nearby places review platform
problems.summary: Location-based discovery: S2 geo index, ranked nearby feed, 250M reviews, photo CDN, owner portal, ML ranking.

problems.title: Design Discord (low-latency voice + text + servers)
problems.summary: Guilds, low-latency voice via SFU, text in ScyllaDB, lazy guild fan-out for huge member counts.

problems.title: Design End-to-End Encrypted Messaging (Signal protocol, double ratchet)
problems.summary: Signal protocol: X3DH, double ratchet, sender keys, sealed sender, private contact discovery via SGX/PIR.

problems.title: Design Presence Service (online/offline/typing across 1B users)
problems.summary: Soft-state presence at 300M concurrent connections with sharded in-memory ring and pull-mode for celebrities.

problems.title: Design Slack (workspaces, channels, threads, search)
problems.summary: Team chat with workspaces, channels, threads, and full-text search across years of history; Vitess + Solr.

problems.title: Design Telegram (cloud-stored chats + channels at hundreds of M)
problems.summary: Cloud-first messenger with home-DC routing, pull-based channels, MTProto, and optional E2E secret chats.

problems.title: Design WhatsApp (1:1, groups, E2E encryption, presence)
problems.summary: Globally distributed E2E messenger: persistent sockets, Signal protocol, presence, group fan-out at 100B msgs/day.

problems.title: Design Blockchain-style Append-only Ledger (Merkle tree, BFT consensus)
problems.summary: Permissioned BFT (HotStuff) ledger, Merkle proofs, BLS threshold sigs, channel privacy, 10K tx/s with 2 s finality.

problems.title: Design Code Execution Sandbox (Docker + cgroups + seccomp, multi-language)
problems.summary: Multi-tenant remote code execution as a service with gVisor + cgroups v2 + seccomp, warm pools, weighted-fair queueing, and per-tenant quotas.

problems.title: Design Distributed Cron / Scheduler (Quartz at scale, exactly-once trigger)
problems.summary: Sharded scheduler firing millions of cron jobs/min with optimistic CAS claim, etcd leases, Kafka due-bus, and effectively-once dispatch via LWT fire log.

problems.title: Design Distributed ID Generator (Snowflake, ULID, K-sortable)
problems.summary: 64-bit Snowflake (ts/worker/seq), ZooKeeper worker leases, ULID variant, clock-skew defense, k-sortability for B-trees.

problems.title: Design IoT Data Pipeline (1B devices, MQTT → time-series store)
problems.summary: MQTT broker fleet, Kafka backbone, Flink rules + rollups, Druid + Cassandra shadow, downlink commands, kappa-style design.

problems.title: Design Live Polling / Voting at Scale (1M+ votes/sec, real-time aggregation)
problems.summary: 1.5 M votes/sec live poll system with sharded Redis counters, Flink combiner pre-agg, idempotent dedup, and Merkle-signed final tally.

problems.title: Design Online Judge (LeetCode/HackerRank — sandboxed code execution)
problems.summary: Multi-language competitive programming platform with Firecracker/gVisor sandboxing, contest-grade fairness, and real-time leaderboards.

problems.title: Design Pastebin (text + code paste with syntax highlight, expiry)
problems.summary: Postgres metadata + S3 bodies, Tree-sitter highlight, Redis HTML cache, expiry sweeper, abuse pipeline.

problems.title: Design Real-time Leaderboard (gaming, top-K via Redis sorted set + sharding)
problems.summary: 50 M MAU global game leaderboard using sharded Redis ZSETs, scatter-gather top-K merge, t-digest for long-tail rank, and Kafka-fed Cassandra audit.

problems.title: Design Twitter Trending Topics (count-min sketch, top-K streaming)
problems.summary: Streaming top-K trends from 500 K tweets/sec using count-min sketch + Space-Saving + HLL, with z-score spike detection and bot suppression.

problems.title: Design URL Shortener (TinyURL/Bitly — base62, click analytics)
problems.summary: Base62 short codes, multi-region KV, Kafka click stream, ClickHouse analytics, 40K rps redirect path.

problems.title: Design Webhook Delivery Service (at-least-once, retry, signing)
problems.summary: Kafka spine, per-endpoint isolation queues, exponential backoff to 72 h, HMAC-SHA256 signing, SSRF defense, replay UI.

problems.title: Design Email Service (transactional + marketing at scale, SES-style)
problems.summary: SES-style email platform: templates, DKIM signing, IP pool reputation, bounce/complaint feedback, 5B/day.

problems.title: Design In-app Notifications (real-time inbox, read/unread, badge counts)
problems.summary: Per-user inbox with WebSocket fan-out, atomic badge counters, and cross-device read-state sync at 5M concurrent connections.

problems.title: Design Multi-channel Notification Orchestrator (channel choice, dedup, prefs)
problems.summary: Channel selection, dedup, frequency caps, quiet hours, and async fallback across push/email/SMS/in-app.

problems.title: Design Notification Scheduler (cron + delayed jobs at billion-scale)
problems.summary: Durable cron + delayed job firing with sharded time-bucket index, leases, and exactly-once dispatch at 200k fires/sec.

problems.title: Design Push Notification System (APNs + FCM at 100M+ devices)
problems.summary: Multi-provider push fan-out with token management, priority lanes, and feedback-driven token GC at 250k sends/sec.

problems.title: Design SMS Gateway (multi-carrier, deliverability, fallback)
problems.summary: Global A2P SMS routing across aggregators and direct SMPP with health-aware failover and DLR ingestion.

problems.title: Design Double-Entry Ledger System (immutable, balanced, auditable)
problems.summary: Append-only double-entry ledger: zero-sum invariant, SSI, hash chain, point-in-time balances.

problems.title: Design Fraud Detection at Scale (real-time ML scoring)
problems.summary: Inline ML risk scoring: feature store, Flink pipelines, GBT models, rule engine, graph features.

problems.title: Design Idempotent Payment Processing (no double-charge)
problems.summary: Bulletproof idempotency layer: keys, hashes, in-flight states, transactional binding to side effects.

problems.title: Design PayPal (P2P payments, multi-currency, fraud)
problems.summary: Global P2P + merchant payments: multi-currency wallets, sagas, ledger, fraud, FX, idempotency.

problems.title: Design Stripe (payments-as-API for merchants)
problems.summary: Developer-first payments API: idempotency, PaymentIntents, webhooks, ledger, acquirer connectors.

problems.title: Design UPI (unified payments interface, NPCI-style)
problems.summary: Real-time interbank rail: VPA directory, two-leg saga across banks, settlement, 10B txns/month.

problems.title: Design A/B Testing Platform (bucketing, stats engine, guardrails)
problems.summary: Deterministic SDK bucketing, exposure dedupe via Flink, CUPED + sequential testing, automated guardrail halts at 1000-experiment scale.

problems.title: Design Candidate Generation Pipeline (ANN, FAISS/HNSW, recall-focused)
problems.summary: Multi-source recall stage merging two-tower, item-CF, graph and trending retrievers via scatter-gather with hedged requests under 50ms.

problems.title: Design Cold-start Recommender (new users / new items)
problems.summary: Onboarding bootstrap, content-based ANN, exploration budget and Thompson bandits to warm up 5M new items/day with safety guardrails.

problems.title: Design Multi-armed Bandit Recommender (exploration vs exploitation, Thompson)
problems.summary: Thompson Sampling and LinUCB with Flink-driven posterior updates, propensity logging, and IPS off-policy evaluation at 580K decisions/sec.

problems.title: Design Ranking Service (GBDT to DLRM, feature store, real-time)
problems.summary: Precision-stage scorer evolving XGBoost to DLRM, multi-objective combiner, online+offline feature store, 1.16B scoring ops/sec.

problems.title: Design Two-tower Recommender System (user/item embeddings, ANN serving)
problems.summary: User/item dual encoders, sampled-softmax training, FAISS/ScaNN ANN serving for sub-30ms candidate retrieval at 500M-item scale.

problems.title: Design Driver Matching Engine (geospatial + supply/demand)
problems.summary: Sub-second dispatch over 5M concurrent drivers using S2 cells, scoring, and offer locks.

problems.title: Design ETA Prediction Service (ML-based, real-time traffic)
problems.summary: Two-stage ETA: contraction-hierarchy router plus GBM ranker over live traffic at 500K QPS.

problems.title: Design Geo-Indexing with S2 / H3 / Geohash (city quad-trees)
problems.summary: Generic geo-index for kNN and polygon queries across 10M live points and 1.25M writes/sec.

problems.title: Design Lyft (multi-modal: rideshare + bikes + scooters)
problems.summary: Unified mobility platform spanning cars, bikes, and scooters with shared wallet and IoT unlock.

problems.title: Design Surge Pricing (real-time supply-demand pricing)
problems.summary: Per-cell multipliers from streaming D/S ratios with hysteresis, caps, and quote locking.

problems.title: Design Uber (rider/driver matching at city scale)
problems.summary: City-scale rideshare: dispatch, geo-index, trip FSM, and payments at 25M trips/day.

problems.title: Design Autocomplete / Typeahead (sub-100ms, top-K trie)
problems.summary: Sub-100ms keystroke suggestions backed by a precomputed top-K trie/FST and trending overlay.

problems.title: Design Elasticsearch architecture (inverted index, sharded, near-real-time)
problems.summary: Distributed Lucene-on-shards engine with NRT refresh, leader-based replication, and aggregations.

problems.title: Design Google Web Search (crawler + indexer + serving)
problems.summary: Planet-scale crawl, inverted-index build, and sub-300ms serving for ~100B queries/month.

problems.title: Design Image / Visual Search (embeddings + ANN: FAISS / HNSW)
problems.summary: Billion-scale visual similarity search with vision embeddings, IVF-PQ, HNSW, and full-precision rerank.

problems.title: Design Search Ranking Service (BM25 -> learning-to-rank)
problems.summary: Multi-stage ranking cascade from BM25 candidates to GBDT and transformer cross-encoder rerankers.

problems.title: Design Spell Checker / Did-You-Mean (edit distance, ngrams)
problems.summary: Noisy-channel spell correction over a Levenshtein-FST term dictionary with bigram language model.

problems.title: Design Facebook News Feed (push/pull/hybrid fanout)
problems.summary: Personalized News Feed at 3B MAU: hybrid push/pull fanout, Redis ZSET timelines, ranked candidate generation under 200 ms p99.

problems.title: Design Instagram (feed + stories + reels)
problems.summary: Three-surface media-first network at 2B MAU: feed posts, 24h ephemeral Stories, Reels short-video discovery; transcode pipeline, multi-CDN, separate rankers.

problems.title: Design News Feed Ranking Service (EdgeRank-style)
problems.summary: Ranking service between candidate generator and rendered feed: EdgeRank baseline evolving to multi-task DNN, online feature store, shadow A/B, train-serve skew controls.

problems.title: Design Reddit (threaded comments + voting + subreddits)
problems.summary: Community-organized link aggregator: deeply threaded comments via materialized paths, Cassandra counter-based voting, Wilson Best sort, Hot ranking.

problems.title: Design TikTok For You feed (heavy ML-driven recommendation)
problems.summary: Algorithmic short-video feed at 1B DAU: multi-source candidate generation, two-tower ANN, multi-task DNN ranker, real-time feature loop in seconds.

problems.title: Design Twitter / X Timeline (with celeb fanout problem)
problems.summary: Home timeline at 500M MAU with the asymmetric celebrity fanout problem; hybrid push/pull at the 10K-follower threshold, Manhattan KV, Snowflake-keyed ZSETs.

problems.title: Design Distributed Counter (per-tweet view counter at 1M+ events/sec)
problems.summary: Stream-aggregated counters with Kafka+Flink, Redis fast path, Cassandra rollups, HLL for cardinality, batch reconciliation for exact counts.

problems.title: Design Distributed Rate Limiter (token bucket / leaky bucket, multi-region)
problems.summary: Two-tier rate limiter using token bucket Lua scripts in Redis, in-pod leases, sliding-window counters, CRDT cross-region sync.

problems.title: Design Distributed Session Store (sticky vs shared, eviction, TTL)
problems.summary: Hybrid JWT + opaque-refresh-token session store, Redis volatile-LRU eviction, sliding TTL, Kafka-based cross-region revocation.

problems.title: Design DynamoDB-style KV store (consistent hashing, vector clocks, gossip)
problems.summary: Leaderless AP key-value store with vnodes, tunable N/R/W quorums, vector-clock conflict resolution, hinted handoff and Merkle anti-entropy.

problems.title: Design Memcached (LRU, consistent-hash, multi-tenant)
problems.summary: Multi-tenant look-aside cache with slab allocator, segmented LRU, consistent hashing via mcrouter, lease-based stampede protection.

problems.title: Design Redis Cluster (16384 hash slots, replication, failover)
problems.summary: Sharded in-memory KV with CRC16 hash slots, async master-replica replication, gossip-based failover, and online resharding.

problems.title: Design Cloud Gaming (Stadia / GeForce Now — sub-50ms input-to-pixel)
problems.summary: GPU-backed cloud gaming with NVENC H.265, WebRTC transport, MIG multi-tenancy, and 50-PoP edge fleet.

problems.title: Design Google Meet (browser-based VC, WebRTC)
problems.summary: Browser-first conferencing with VP9 SVC, Spanner control plane, ASR captions, and cascaded SFU mesh.

problems.title: Design Hotstar / JioCinema (live + VOD with 25M+ concurrent)
problems.summary: Live cricket streaming at 30M+ concurrent: multi-CDN steering, LL-HLS, surge handling, reactions fanout.

problems.title: Design Low-latency Live Streaming (LL-HLS, CMAF, sub-3s glass-to-glass)
problems.summary: CDN-scale 2-3s glass-to-glass live streaming via CMAF chunked transfer, blocking playlists, and origin shield.

problems.title: Design Netflix (VOD at planetary scale)
problems.summary: Global VOD: Open Connect CDN, multi-region control plane, personalization, and viewer-state at 250M MAU.

problems.title: Design Twitch (live streaming with chat at 10M concurrent)
problems.summary: Live RTMP ingest, ABR transcode, LL-HLS CDN delivery, and Erlang-backed chat fanout for 10M concurrent viewers.

problems.title: Design Video Recommendation System (candidate gen + ranking)
problems.summary: Two-stage reco at billion-item corpus: ANN candidate gen, multi-task DNN ranker, real-time features, cold start.

problems.title: Design Video Transcoding Pipeline (multi-bitrate, multi-codec)
problems.summary: Chunked parallel encode/stitch DAG: probe, ABR ladder, per-title encoding, VMAF gate, AV1 backfill at 30k hr/hr.

problems.title: Design Video Upload & Processing Pipeline (chunked, resumable, virus scan, thumbnails)
problems.summary: Resumable presigned multipart uploads, SHA-256 verify, virus scan gate, probe, thumbnails, dedupe before transcode.

problems.title: Design WebRTC SFU vs MCU architecture for group video calls
problems.summary: Compare mesh, SFU, MCU, and hybrid topologies; per-subscriber layer selection, cascading, and SFrame E2E.

problems.title: Design YouTube (UGC video platform)
problems.summary: User-generated video at 2.7B MAU: chunked uploads, transcoding, search, two-stage recommendations, Content ID.

problems.title: Design Zoom (video conferencing)
problems.summary: Planet-scale video conferencing on SFU media plane with simulcast, breakout rooms, recording, and PSTN bridging.
